'''shakodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiphodon|xiphodon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-k-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiphodon|xiphodon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shakodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shækedeth|shækedeth]] || [[word:shækedej|shækedej]] || [[word:shækedesh|shækedesh]] || [[word:shækede|shækede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shakokodoth|shakokodoth]] || [[word:shakokodoj|shakokodoj]] || [[word:shakokodosh|shakokodosh]] || [[word:shakokodo|shakokodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shakodoth|shakodoth]] || [[word:shakodoj|shakodoj]] || [[word:shakodosh|shakodosh]] || [[word:shakodo|shakodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shakofdoth|shakofdoth]] || [[word:shakofdoj|shakofdoj]] || [[word:shakofdosh|shakofdosh]] || [[word:shakofdof|shakofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shakodotho|shakodotho]] || [[word:shakodojo|shakodojo]] || [[word:shakodosho|shakodosho]] || [[word:shakodoko|shakodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shakodoth|shakodoth]] || [[word:shakodoj|shakodoj]] || [[word:shakodosh|shakodosh]] || [[word:shakodo|shakodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shakodothol|shakodothol]] || [[word:shakodojol|shakodojol]] || [[word:shakodoshol|shakodoshol]] || [[word:shakodokol|shakodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shakodothotho|shakodothotho]] || [[word:shakodojojo|shakodojojo]] || [[word:shakodoshosho|shakodoshosho]] || [[word:shakodoko|shakodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shakodothon|shakodothon]] || [[word:shakodojon|shakodojon]] || [[word:shakodoshon|shakodoshon]] || [[word:shakodokon|shakodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shakodothoro|shakodothoro]] || [[word:shakodojoro|shakodojoro]] || [[word:shakodoshoro|shakodoshoro]] || [[word:shakodokoro|shakodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
